items.description: Leads the Environmental and Development Economics research cluster, Oxford Brookes University.
Field Chair of the Economics Department.
Research Leader of the Department of Accounting, Finance and Economics.
Member of the Corporate Identity Group, which interviewed and selected the consultants who coined the name and logo for Oxford Brookes University.
Convener of the Ethnic Minority Staff Forum for the full duration of its existence.
Co-organiser of a conference on equal opportunities at OBU on behalf of the Equal Opportunity Action Group (EOAG). Sat on selection and recruitment panels for promotions.
Member of the Environment Forum from its inception; active role in sustainability and fair trade initiatives.
Led the development of a Masters programme (MSc in International Management and International Relations) at Oxford Brookes University.
Collaborated in a bid for Central Research Fund with Prof Peter Edge; participated in international conference on Shariah and Legal Globalisation.
Co-organised multiple international Punjab Research Group conferences including on 'Punjab: Past, Present and Future' (2015) and 'Momentous Events in the History of Punjab' (2014).
Organised a special lecture by Financial Times Associate Editor Martin Wolf on 'After the Crisis: Prospects for the World Economy' (2014).
